$description: Component tokens for Mobile Icon component - a flexible icon system supporting outlined, outlined with square background, and filled with glow variants. Includes multiple sizes (4xs through 4xl) and comprehensive color palettes (neutral, primary/blue, error/red, warning/orange, success/green). Figma Reference: Node ID 225-20469

$component.name: Icon
$component.description: A mobile icon component system providing flexible icon display options. Supports three visual variants: outlined icons (stroke only), outlined icons with square background containers, and filled icons with glow/halo effects. Includes comprehensive size and color options for various use cases.
$component.structure: Icon element with optional square background container. Outlined variant has stroke only, square background variant adds a rounded square container behind the icon, filled glow variant has solid fill with lighter glow effect around it.

variants.outlined: Icon with stroke only, no fill or background - minimal and clean appearance
variants.square-background: Icon with stroke, placed on a rounded square background container - provides visual emphasis and better contrast
variants.filled-glow: Icon with solid fill and lighter glow/halo effect around it - creates emphasis and visual depth

usage.contexts: Mobile navigation, buttons, status indicators, notifications, badges, feature highlights, action buttons, information displays, form elements, list items
usage.features: Multiple visual styles, comprehensive size range, semantic color palettes, square background option, glow effects, stroke and fill variants

size.$comment: Icon size tokens - dimensions for the icon element itself across all size variants

color.$comment: Icon color tokens - stroke colors for outlined variants, fill colors for filled variants
